entities.name: Maymon
entities.raw_quote: Maymon rex, Albunalich, Assaibi, Haibalidech, Yasfla... subditi Saturno et vento eius

entities.name: Albunalich
entities.raw_quote: The Northern ones are these: Maymon the king, Albunalich...

entities.name: Mextyura
entities.raw_quote: Et excitantes eum sunt isti: Mextyura, Alcybany, Alflas

entities.name: Formione
entities.raw_quote: Formione rex, Guth, Maguth, Gutrhyn eius ministri... subditi Iovi et ventis eius

entities.name: Guth
entities.raw_quote: Formione the king, and his ministers Guth, Maguth, and Gutrhyn

entities.name: Harit
entities.raw_quote: Et excitantes eos sunt isti: Harit, Iesse, Ryon, Nesaph, Naadob

entities.name: Sarabocres
entities.raw_quote: Sarabocres rex, Nassar, Cynassa eius ministri... subditi Veneri et ventis eius

entities.name: Cambores
entities.raw_quote: Et excitantes eos sunt isti: Cambores, Trachatat, Nassar, Naassa

entities.name: Abaa
entities.raw_quote: Abaa rex, Hyici, Quyron, Zach, Eladeb eius ministri... subditi Mercurio et ventis eius

entities.name: Zobha
entities.raw_quote: Et excitantes eos sunt isti: Zobha, Drohas, Palas, Zambas

entities.name: Lialy

attributes.function: Name of Creator to write outside circle

entities.raw_quote: scribere in terra vel in cedulis 7 nomina creatoris, que sunt L[a]ialy...

entities.name: Seal of Solomon
entities.raw_quote: Signum Salomonis ad salvacionem et defensionem pono supra me

entities.name: Circle

attributes.dimensions: 9 feet across, two circles 1 foot apart

entities.raw_quote: protrahat circulum 9 pedum dicens... duos circulos protrahat, quorum unus distet ab alio per unum pedem

entities.name: Heptagon
entities.raw_quote: protrahes infra istos duos circulos eptagonum communem omnibus invocacionibus aptum

entities.name: Incense (Thus)

attributes.usage: fumigation of circle on second day

entities.raw_quote: habeas thus et thuribulum, in quo sint prune, et ponas thus super prunas

entities.name: Jesus Christ
entities.raw_quote: O Lord Jesus Christ, son of the living God... I beg you in this critical moment

summary: This chunk details the specific spirits and angels associated with four directional regions (North, East/South, South/West, West/North), including their names, hierarchies, physical descriptions, powers, and signs of invocation. It concludes with detailed ritual instructions for purification, circle construction, drawing sigils like the heptagon, and using divine names to protect and command these entities.
key_passages: Their nature is to sow discord, create hatred, evil thoughts, theft, and greed; they give lead if desired, kill anyone, and destroy limbs.
Their bodies are long and slender, full of wrath and anger. They have four faces: one is forward, another behind...

If therefore anybody wishes to operate with those spirits, we must first warn him strictly that he must be thoroughly purified... until he comes to the fourteenth day, on which day he must begin his fast.
I put the Seal of Solomon over me for salvation and defense, in order that it protect me in the face of the enemy. In the name of the Father and the Son and the Holy Spirit. Amen.
Their nature is to give all metals from the earth, whichever exist, lettered or sculpted with gold and silver as desired...
